heading: Remote vMix & OBS consulting for clients abroad.
sub: Building live graphics packages and advising on broadcast technical setups for international productions — with a 100% job-success record.

clients.name: Thayer Trophy (Chrislove Production)
clients.desc: Remote technical director & vMix engineer for the Thayer Trophy live broadcast — built animated graphics wired to registration spreadsheets, routed audio busses, and authored a Companion control surface so the executive producer could run the show.

clients.name: Newport Bermuda Race (Chrislove Production)
clients.desc: Remote technical director & vMix engineer for the Newport Bermuda Race 2026 live broadcast — strategic partner from day one, recommended the vMix build, authored the Companion control surface, and operated from 11 time zones away.

clients.name: Tachartas Sports
clients.desc: vMix consultant — built the live graphics GT package and advised on the full broadcast technical setup for their YouTube sports channel.

clients.name: Mr. Nguyen Tuyen
clients.desc: Streaming & broadcast studio setup — created the graphic GT package and provided technical consultation for Tuyen News TV.

clients.name: Upwork Profile
clients.desc: OBS & vMix setups, dual-PC capture, Stream Deck and audio engineering — 19 jobs on the platform, plus direct clients outside Upwork.

testimonial.quote: “I’m highly satisfied with Tri Muhammad Jidan’s excellent work setting up my studio. His professionalism, dedication, and attention to detail were impressive. The job was done promptly and affordably. If I could give more than 5 stars, I would. Highly recommended!”
testimonial.cite: Tuyen — Streaming & Broadcast Studio Setup, Upwork

testimonial.quote: “Tri saved my live broadcast! This was a small project with a small and inexperienced crew. At the last minute I had to run offsite to solve a technical issue and Tri stepped in as the technical director, remotely getting our live stream up and running, creating onscreen graphics from scratch, getting music going, and generally saving us from failure. I can’t thank him enough! Tri’s experience, technical acumen, and easygoing personality, even under pressure, makes him an invaluable member of any broadcast team.”
testimonial.cite: Chris Love — Executive Producer, Thayer Trophy

testimonial.quote: “Tri was my strategic partner from the very beginning, consulting with me on every aspect of designing my live broadcast. We ultimately followed his recommendation of using vMix as the main engine for the show and I’m so glad we did! Tri created all the animated graphics and wired them to complex spreadsheets full of registration data, which was the core task I asked of him. But then he also handled tons of other tasks including setting up vMix calls, working with the audio engineer to route all the busses to/from the mixer, and creating an intuitive interface on Companion so I could control everything. Because of our 11-hour time difference, Tri worked around the clock on the setup and broadcast days, but never seemed to tire. We stayed connected the whole time via Slack, Parsec, video calls, and even our comms system during the show. Despite being remote, he was one of the most valuable people in the control room.”
testimonial.cite: Chris Love — Executive Producer, Newport Bermuda Race
